friends.pageDesc: Connect and share expenses with your friends

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.pageDesc: Stay up to date with the latest updates
notifications.goal_monthly_reminder: Remember to add to your {{count}} active goals this month 🎯

whatsNew.title: What's new?
whatsNew.subtitle: Here are the improvements and features that arrived in this version.

sharedExpenses.title: Shared expenses
sharedExpenses.item1: Share any expense with one or more Spendia friends
sharedExpenses.item2: Each participant sees it automatically in their history
sharedExpenses.item3: Anyone can delete the expense for all with one tap

splitCalc.title: Proportional split
splitCalc.item1: Split equally or set custom percentages per person
splitCalc.item2: Real-time preview of the exact amount per person
splitCalc.item3: Works with installments and interest rates automatically

newForm.title: Full-screen form
newForm.item1: The + button now opens a dedicated screen with more space
newForm.item2: Same flow as always: amount, category, card, date
newForm.item3: The sharing section appears at the bottom, out of the way

syncHistory.title: Synced history
syncHistory.item1: Shared expenses show a 👥 chip in the transaction list
syncHistory.item2: You see your exact share of the amount, not the total
syncHistory.item3: Instant notifications when someone shares an expense with you

budget.title: Monthly budget
budget.item2: Visual progress chart in real time
budget.item3: Smart control of fixed transactions across months

friends.title: Friends system
friends.item2: Send, accept or reject friend requests
friends.item3: Manage your friends list from your profile

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.item1: Numeric badge for unread notifications in real time
notifications.item2: Tap to mark as read individually
notifications.item3: Delete notifications or mark all as read in one tap

navbarRedesign.title: Redesigned navbar
navbarRedesign.item1: Animated pill perfectly centered on the active icon
navbarRedesign.item2: Smooth fade-in and fade-out animation when switching tabs
navbarRedesign.item3: Cleaner design: pill inside the icon container, no manual position math

improvements.title: General improvements
improvements.item1: Fingerprint / Face ID for quick unlock
improvements.item2: Redesigned email and PIN sign-in screen
improvements.item3: Unified visual design across the entire app

badges.title: Credit/debit badge
badges.item1: Recent transactions on the home screen now show a 'C' badge for credit and 'D' for debit
badges.item2: Identify at a glance which card you used for each expense
badges.item3: Color changes by type: blue for credit, green for debit

versionedNews.title: Versioned what's new
versionedNews.item1: This screen now shows only the changes for the current version
versionedNews.item2: No more repeated updates from previous versions
versionedNews.item3: Each version brings its own list of improvements

savingsGoals.title: Savings Goals
savingsGoals.item1: Create goals with name, emoji, and target amount
savingsGoals.item2: Log savings and track your progress with a visual bar
savingsGoals.item3: Reach your goal and celebrate with a special animation 🎉

toolsHub.title: Tools Hub
toolsHub.item1: New Tools tab with centralized access to features
toolsHub.item2: Manage Categories and Goals from one place
toolsHub.item3: More tools coming soon to supercharge your finances

annualReport.title: Annual PDF Report
annualReport.item1: Generate your fiscal year transaction report
annualReport.item2: Category breakdown with totals and item list
annualReport.item3: Perfect for your accountant or personal archive

sentIncomeFeature.title: Send income to friends
sentIncomeFeature.item1: Log an expense and send it as income to another Spendia user
sentIncomeFeature.item2: Your friend sees it automatically in their history as received income
sentIncomeFeature.item3: Perfect for reimbursements, transfers, or splitting bills informally

friendReport.title: Friend expense report
friendReport.item1: Select a friend and month to see all shared transactions between you
friendReport.item2: Instantly identify who owes who and how much with the net balance
friendReport.item3: Generate a downloadable and shareable image with every transaction detailed

annualReportImage.title: Annual report as images
annualReportImage.item1: The annual report is now generated as high-quality images instead of PDF
annualReportImage.item2: Download each page or share it directly from the app
annualReportImage.item3: Improved visual design with summary, categories and yearly movements

customCategories.title: Custom categories
customCategories.item1: Create your own categories with a unique icon and name
customCategories.item2: Now displayed correctly in home, history and detail
customCategories.item3: Organize your expenses and income exactly as you need

spendiaDomain.title: Now at spendia.co
spendiaDomain.item1: The app has its own domain: spendia.co
spendiaDomain.item2: Google sign-in is now more stable and secure
spendiaDomain.item3: Install Spendia as a PWA directly from spendia.co

expenseGroups.title: Group Expenses
expenseGroups.item1: Create groups for trips or outings and track who paid what
expenseGroups.item2: Automatically calculate who owes whom and how much
expenseGroups.item3: Settle or reopen groups with a single tap
